nodes.name: Phylloscopus
nodes.summary: Phylloscopus（Phylloscopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联80种鸟类，如Western Bonelli's warbler、Eastern Bonelli's warbler、橙斑翅柳莺等80种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-capped woodland warbler
nodes.summary: The black-capped woodland warbler (Phylloscopus herberti) is a leaf warbler species in the family Phylloscopidae; it was formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage. It is native to the Western High Plateau, Bioko and Equatorial Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
